instructions.instruction: Give each OUTPUT a specific Match tag; NEVER use `Match *` on all outputs simultaneously.
Always set Mem_Buf_Limit on INPUT plugins to bound memory use.
NEVER store sensitive values directly in fluent-bit.conf; reference environment variables or secrets.
Enrich Kubernetes logs with the kubernetes filter for pod/namespace metadata.
Validate the generated configuration with the fluentbit-validator skill before finishing.
